name: GEMM (INT16 × INT16)
signature: void matmul_i16_i16(int16_t* a_in, int16_t* b_in, int16_t* c_out);
description: Vectorized INT16 matrix multiply with INT16 output. Tile sizes controlled by DIM_M/DIM_K/DIM_N defines (default 4x4x4). Uses 4x4 mmul expansion for AIE2 efficiency. Instantiated from mm.cc combos macro.
